drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures fluid quick disconnect couplings, valves, filters, control linkages, servo savers, and propellers as components for UAV, land systems, and marine defense OEMs. Supplying the UAV industry since 1999.

evidence.snippet: Introducing the Battlefield EnduroLink™ 2.0. The evolution of a legendary UAV quick disconnect coupler.

items.name: EnduroLink (EL Series)
items.product_type: quick disconnect coupler for extreme temperature fuel applications

evidence.snippet: EnduroLink™ is the best choice for extreme temperature fuel applications when vibration and dusty conditions are unavoidable.
Require fewer spares and experience less coupler-related vehicle down time, reducing repair requirements.
The only high pressure quick connect fluid coupling series available designed first to meet MIL-DTL-25427B.

The multi-fuel series is designed for use in the UAV unmanned air vehicle industry, enabling fuel flow in one direction only.
Explore Parts
The Servo Saver will protect your UAV servos and integrates easily with your platform due to it's low-profile, strong and lightweight build.

items.name: CA Series
items.product_type: UAV control rod linkage and push rod assemblies

evidence.snippet: UAV-Grade extreme environment control rod linkage and push rod assemblies.

items.name: VL Series
items.product_type: quick disconnect coupler for UAV engine oil heating lines

evidence.snippet: Designed for heating engine oil lines in UAVs to facilitate higher flight. The coupler comes with an access port for an internal heating electrode.
A high-performance, high pressure, thread type coupling that can be coupled by hand or with the aid of a spanner tool to overcome system pressure.
A superior propeller custom-designed to meet your specific flight requirements, delivering optimized performance and reduced acoustic radiation.

tagline: Canadian supplier of fluid quick disconnects, check valves, servo savers, and propellers for UAVs, land systems, and marine platforms. EnduroLink couplers are world-standard in tactical UAV fuel systems; early 01Y/02Y variants deployed on Textron AAI Shadow. MIL-DTL-25427B compliance documented for HP Series. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence of specific defense contracts limited; company claims theatre-proven products but independent verification sparse.
